title: Git Workflow for Skill Development
description: Interactive Mermaid visualization for git workflow for skill development
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
mermaid
learningObjectives: Sequence the Git operations in the skill development workflow: add, commit, push, and tag
Explain the role each Git command plays in versioning a Claude skill from initial creation to published release
Identify the decision points where a skill is judged ready for publication before a release is tagged
Trace how a skill edit moves from the working directory through the staging area and local commit to the remote GitHub repository
